---
title: "Memory Frame Bindings"
---

## Overview

Memory (static) input slots hold tensors that persist across frames — reference
images, prior masks, or other context the model reads but does not recompute
every step. Each **position** along the slot's memory buffer is configured as
either:

- **Static** — data already exists in DataManager or DataBank and is encoded (or
  reused) at inference time.
- **Recurrent** — the raw output tensor from a model output slot at the previous
  frame is fed back into this position.

This replaces the former split between `StaticInputData`, `RecurrentBindingData`,
and widget-only sequence-entry variants. One struct (`MemoryFrameBinding`) covers
single-frame slots (`sequence_dim = -1`, one position) and multi-frame sequence
slots (`sequence_dim >= 0`, one binding per position).

**Core types:** `src/DeepLearning/bindings/DeepLearningBindingData.hpp`  
**AutoParamWidget forms:** `src/DeepLearning/bindings/BindingParamSchemas.hpp`  
**UI hints:** `src/DeepLearning/bindings/BindingParamSchemas.cpp`  
**Widget:** `src/WhiskerToolbox/DeepLearning_Widget/UI/Helpers/MemorySlotWidget.hpp`

## Data model

### MemoryFrameBinding

```cpp
struct MemoryFrameBinding {
    std::string slot_name;           // e.g. "memory_masks"
    int memory_index = 0;            // position along sequence_dim
    MemoryFrameSourceVariant frame;  // StaticFrameSource | RecurrentFrameSource
    bool active = true;              // boolean mask slots only
};
```

Session state stores all memory positions in a single vector:

```cpp
std::vector<dl::MemoryFrameBinding> memory_frames;  // DeepLearningStateData
```

### Tagged unions

All variants use `rfl::TaggedUnion` with an internal discriminator field.
`extractParameterSchema<>()` auto-detects these for AutoParamWidget.

| Union | Discriminator | Alternatives |
|---|---|---|
| `MemoryFrameSourceVariant` | `"frame_kind"` | `StaticFrameSource`, `RecurrentFrameSource` |
| `StaticInputSourceVariant` | `"static_source"` | `DataManagerStaticSource`, `DataBankStaticSource` |
| `RecurrentInitVariant` | `"init_mode"` | `ZerosInit`, `StaticCaptureInit`, `FirstOutputInit` |

**Static frame** — input already exists:

- `DataManagerStaticSource` — re-encode `data_key` at `current_frame + time_offset`.
- `DataBankStaticSource` — reuse tensor from `bank_entry_id`. When empty,
  `resolvedBankEntryId()` falls back to `{slot_name}_{memory_index}` via
  `defaultBankEntryId()`.

**Recurrent frame** — feedback from a prior model step:

- `output_slot_name` — which model output feeds this position.
- `init` — how to seed the recurrent tensor at t=0 (`ZerosInit`,
  `StaticCaptureInit`, `FirstOutputInit`).

A parallel `RecurrentInitMode` enum and string converters
(`recurrentInitModeToString`, `recurrentInitModeFromString`) exist for
engine code; bindings store the tagged `RecurrentInitVariant` in JSON.

Example JSON (recurrent position):

```json
{
  "slot_name": "memory_masks",
  "memory_index": 0,
  "frame": {
    "frame_kind": "RecurrentFrameSource",
    "output_slot_name": "mask_out",
    "init": { "init_mode": "ZerosInit" }
  },
  "active": true
}
```

### Access helpers

`DeepLearningBindingData.hpp` provides Qt-free accessors over the tagged unions.
Because `rfl::TaggedUnion` wraps `rfl::Variant`, helpers use `rfl::get` and
`rfl::holds_alternative` on `.variant()`:

```cpp
if (dl::isRecurrentFrame(binding)) { ... }
auto key = dl::staticDataKey(binding);
auto mode = dl::recurrentInitMode(binding);
```

| Helper | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `isStaticFrame` / `isRecurrentFrame` | Frame kind |
| `staticSourceType` | `StaticInputSource::DataManager` or `DataBank` |
| `staticDataKey` / `staticTimeOffset` | DataManager static fields |
| `staticBankEntryId` / `resolvedBankEntryId` | DataBank entry ID (explicit or default) |
| `hasActiveStaticSource` | Enough config to participate in assembly |
| `recurrentOutputSlot` | Output slot name for recurrent frames |
| `hasActiveRecurrentBinding` | Recurrent frame with a non-empty, non-`(None)` output slot |
| `hasActiveRecurrentBindings` | Any active recurrent frame in a vector |
| `findMemoryFrame` | Lookup by `slot_name` + `memory_index` |
| `recurrentInitMode` | `RecurrentInitMode` enum from tagged init |
| `staticCaptureDataKey` / `staticCaptureFrame` | `StaticCaptureInit` fields |

`recurrentCacheKey(input_slot_name)` (global helper) builds the carried-tensor
cache key `"recurrent:{input_slot_name}"` used during recurrent sequences.

## AutoParamWidget forms

Form structs omit `slot_name` and `memory_index` (the widget shell supplies those).

| Form struct | Binding projection | Fields |
|---|---|---|
| `StaticFrameSourceForm` | `StaticFrameSource` | `source` (`StaticInputSourceVariant`) |
| `RecurrentFrameSourceForm` | `RecurrentFrameSource` | `output_slot_name`, `init` |

Conversion helpers in `BindingParamSchemas.hpp`:

| Helper | Direction |
|---|---|
| `toStaticMemoryFrame(slot_name, memory_index, form)` | static form → `MemoryFrameBinding` |
| `toRecurrentMemoryFrame(slot_name, memory_index, form)` | recurrent form → `MemoryFrameBinding` |
| `fromStaticMemoryFrame(binding)` | static binding → form (empty when not static) |
| `fromRecurrentMemoryFrame(binding)` | recurrent binding → form (empty when not recurrent) |
| `makeCaptureBinding(slot_name, memory_index, data_key)` | DataManager capture helper for DataBank workflows |

Dynamic and output slot forms remain in
[binding_param_schemas.qmd](binding_param_schemas.qmd).

## UI: MemorySlotWidget

`MemorySlotWidget` replaces the former `StaticInputSlotWidget`,
`SequenceSlotWidget`, and `RecurrentBindingWidget`. One widget instance is created
per memory input slot in `DeepLearningPropertiesWidget`.

For each sequence position (or the single position when `sequence_dim = -1`):

1. **Frame kind** combo — Static or Recurrent (mutually exclusive).
2. **Stacked form** — `AutoParamWidget` for `StaticFrameSourceForm` or
   `RecurrentFrameSourceForm`.

Sequence slots (`sequence_dim >= 0`) expose **Add Entry** / **Remove Last** controls
up to the model's sequence length. Each row maps to one `MemoryFrameBinding` with
a distinct `memory_index`.

See [DeepLearning Widget Helpers — MemorySlotWidget](../../ui/DeepLearning_Widget/UI/Helpers/helpers.qmd#memoryslotwidget).

## Engine integration

| Component | Role |
|---|---|
| `SlotAssembler::assembleInputs()` | Encodes static positions; skips empty bindings |
| `SlotAssembler::runRecurrentSequence()` | Injects recurrent tensors per active recurrent frame |
| `dl::constraints::computeBatchSizeConstraint()` | Forces batch size 1 when any recurrent frame is active |
| `InferenceController` / batch workers | Pass `memory_frames` from `DeepLearningState` |

Hybrid sequence configurations (e.g. NeuroSAM with four static reference frames
and one recurrent tail position) are expressed as multiple `MemoryFrameBinding`
entries for the same `slot_name` with different `memory_index` values and
per-position `frame_kind`. See
[Hybrid Sequence Inputs](../hybrid_sequence_inputs.qmd).

## ParameterUIHints

Implementations live in `BindingParamSchemas.cpp` — see
[binding_param_schemas.qmd](binding_param_schemas.qmd#parameteruihints) for the
full table. Memory-frame-specific structs: `DataManagerStaticSource`,
`DataBankStaticSource`, `StaticFrameSourceForm`, `StaticCaptureInit`,
`RecurrentFrameSourceForm`.

## Test coverage

| Test file | Coverage |
|---|---|
| `tests/DeepLearning/binding_data/BindingData.test.cpp` | `MemoryFrameBinding` accessors, `computeEncodingFrame`, `RecurrentInitMode` strings, `recurrentCacheKey` |
| `tests/DeepLearning/param_schemas/DeepLearningParamSchemas.test.cpp` | `StaticInputSourceVariant` / `RecurrentInitVariant` schema + JSON, `MemoryFrameBinding` JSON round-trip, memory-frame `ParameterUIHints` |
| `tests/WhiskerToolbox/DeepLearning_Widget/MemorySlotWidget.test.cpp` | Widget `setBindings` / `bindings` round-trip |
| `tests/DeepLearning/constraints/ConstraintEnforcer.test.cpp` | Batch constraint with active recurrent `memory_frames` |
